title: IT Capacity Planning Process for Anonymous Desktop Software Co.
description: A flowchart depicting the cyclical process of monitoring, analyzing, forecasting, and provisioning IT resources to meet the demand for a desktop software product.
elements: IT Resource Utilization (CPU, Memory, Storage, Network)
relationships: Product Demand drives IT Resource Utilization which is measured by Performance Metrics
Performance Metrics and Product Demand feed into the Capacity Forecast Model
The Capacity Forecast Model informs the Procurement/Provisioning Plan
The Procurement/Provisioning Plan leads to New IT Infrastructure being deployed
New IT Infrastructure supports the increasing Product Demand, restarting the cycle
